title: Production images for Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Production images for Rebuild             Quote Post by Archaiel » Sun Jul 17, 2011 3:47 pm I keep hearing people reference production sketches and storyboards for the Rebuild movies and I was wondering if anyone can direct me to a place where I can view them as well. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 19, 2011 4:06 pm Try here.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Tue Jul 19, 2011 4:12 pm You say that as if he had the possibility of failing.
